svg.aria-label: god is dead and all's right with the world; death may be the only absolute freedom there is; anywhere can be paradise as long as you have the will to live; the fate of destruction is also the joy of rebirth
svg.text: god is dead — and all's right with the world
Death may be the only absolute freedom there is.
Anywhere can be paradise, as long as you have the will to live.
The fate of destruction is also the joy of rebirth.
